systemRequires.label: FFmpeg
systemRequires.why: Video/audio compositing, trimming, chroma key, loudness, ffprobe checks.

systemRequires.label: Python 3
systemRequires.why: JSON glue, transcription, and provider API helpers used by media components.

systemRequires.label: Chromium / headless Chrome
systemRequires.why: Headless rendering for HTML graphics, website b-roll capture, and Remotion/HyperFrames frames.
systemRequires.check: chromium --version || google-chrome --version || npx playwright install --dry-run chromium

systemRequires.label: FFmpeg
systemRequires.why: Video/audio compositing, trimming, chroma key, loudness, ffprobe checks.

systemRequires.label: Node.js ≥ 22
systemRequires.why: Runs Remotion / HyperFrames CLIs and Playwright capture scripts.

install.debian: curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs
